title: Iron Dome Configuration
description: Schema for iron-dome.yml — the Iron Dome guard configuration & pattern registry. PBI #427.

guards.description: Map of guard name -> guard configuration.

whitelist.description: Per-file/per-pattern exceptions. Every entry MUST have a reason (auditable).

severity.description: Guard-level severity. blocking fails the commit/push; advisory only warns.

message.description: Custom remediation message shown on violation.

file_types.description: Glob list restricting the guard to matching file types.

critical_patterns.description: Secrets guard: named regex patterns treated as findings.

safe_patterns.description: Secrets guard: regexes that suppress false positives (e.g. ${ENV_VAR}).

max_size_kb.description: large_file guard: maximum file size in KB before blocking.

exclude.description: large_file guard: glob list of files exempt from the size check.

patterns.description: sensitive_files guard: filename globs to block.

allow.description: sensitive_files guard: filename globs explicitly permitted.

exclude_files.description: debt guard: glob list of files exempt from keyword tracking.

protected_branches.description: branch_policy guard: branches that reject direct push.

provider.description: orphan guard: git provider for PR-state lookup.

exclusions.description: Global file exclusions applied before any guard runs.

skip_patterns.description: Path regexes to skip entirely (e.g. node_modules/).

max_file_size_kb.description: Skip scanning files larger than this (KB).

file.description: Glob pattern for the file(s) the exception applies to.

guard.description: Which guard to skip for this file (secrets, sensitive_files, ...).

pattern.description: Optional: narrow the exception to a single named secret pattern.

reason.description: REQUIRED. Why this exception exists. No silent bypasses.

expires.description: Optional: ISO date after which the exception auto-reverts.

file.description: Telemetry log path. Auto-detected by OS if unset.
